column8: If these shoes were not too big for me, I (to buy) them.
column9: If you (to ring) me up, I will tell you a secret.
column10: If you (to be) a poet, you would write beautiful poetry.
column11: If he did not read so much, he (not to know) English literature so well.
column12: If he (not to pass) his exam, he will not get a scholarship.
column13: My father would have more free time if he (not to read) so many newspapers.
column14: If I were a famous singer, I (to get) a lot of flowers every day.
column15: If my brother (to be) in trouble, I will help him, of course.
column16: I wish I (can) give up smoking.
column17: He wishes he (to know) something about cars.
column19: She wishes she (to live) in the Crimea.
